title: The Disagreements about His Age When He Died
description: Some [authorities] state that he was sixty-three years old. Those who state that [are as follows]. Ibn al-Muthanna-I3ajjaj b. al-Minhal1416 - Hammid (that is, Ibn Salamah)-Abu Jamrah1417-Ibn 'Abbas: The Messenger of God stayed in Mecca for thirteen years while the revelation came 118351 to him and ten years in Medina. He died while he was sixty-three years old. Ibn al-Muthanna-Hajjaj b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 09
